label: Message passing & neighborhood aggregation

node.label: Message passing & neighborhood aggregation
node.definition: Entities iteratively exchange and aggregate information along relational edges.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Message passing & neighborhood aggregation is modeled as depending on Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data, Affine transforms & dense layers and feeding downstream nodes such as Graph neural networks, Graph RAG & structured retrieval.
examples: atlas downstream link to Graph neural networks
atlas downstream link to Graph RAG & structured retrieval
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data, Affine transforms & dense layers.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Message passing & neighborhood aggregation has a `uses` dependency on Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data because Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
Message passing & neighborhood aggregation is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
Message passing & neighborhood aggregation is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Pooling & local aggregation.
